title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 170.007 - Industrial quality eye protective devices defined
text:
170.007.  Industrial quality eye protective devices defined. — As used in sections 170.005 to 170.009 "industrial quality eye protective devices" means devices meeting the standards of the American National Standard Practice for Occupational and Educational Eye and Face Protection, Z87.1-1968, and subsequent revisions thereof, approved by the American National Standards Institute, Inc.
(L. 1976 S.B. 519 § 2)
